query:
UPDATE "ob-poc".outreach_requests
            SET
                status = 'RESPONDED',
                response_type = $2,
                response_received_at = NOW(),
                response_document_id = $3,
                resolution_notes = COALESCE($4, resolution_notes),
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE request_id = $1
            RETURNING request_id, target_entity_id, request_type
